package rulecoverage

func PositiveOrderByClauseLiteralsScatteredAcrossLayers() string {
    ruleID := "order_by_clause_literals_scattered_across_layers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Raw sort expressions duplicated in handlers and services instead of query helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
